sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103753" key="thbenno/foros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τηβεννόφορ-ος</orth> (parox.) (also <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τηβεννοφορ-ηφόρος</orth>), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n103753.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wearing the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τήβεννα</foreign>, ib.</sense> </entryFree>
